allow: Bash(cd /home/administrator/kimi-code && echo "===[1a] AstronChatProvider 全仓引用（应只有定义/无 new）===" && grep -rn "AstronChatProvider" --include=*.ts . | grep -v "参考目录" ; echo && echo "===[1b] 子路径导入 providers/astron 的地方===" && grep -rn "providers/astron'" --include=*.ts . | grep -v "参考目录" ; echo && echo "===[1c] createProvider 定义处（v1/v2）===" && grep -rn "case 'astron'" --include=*.ts packages | grep -v "参考目录")
Bash(cd /home/administrator/kimi-code && git status --short | grep -c '\\.test\\.' ; echo "---modified test files---" ; git status --short | grep '\\.test\\.')
Bash(cd /home/administrator/kimi-code && mkdir -p .tmp && CI=1 pnpm test > .tmp/vitest-full.log 2>&1 ; echo "EXIT_CODE=$?" >> .tmp/vitest-full.log)

Bash(cd /home/administrator/kimi-code && \( timeout -k 15 900 pnpm exec vitest run --exclude '**/harness/**' --test-timeout=20000 --hook-timeout=30000 --reporter=dot > .tmp/root-nohang.log 2>&1 ; echo "ROOT_EXIT=$?" >> .tmp/root-nohang.log \) & echo "已启动根跑 PID=$!\(排除 harness,20s 单测超时,总)

Bash(cd /home/administrator/kimi-code && \( timeout -k 15 900 pnpm exec vitest run --exclude '**/harness/**' --test-timeout=20000 --hook-timeout=30000 --reporter=dot > .tmp/root-nohang.log 2>&1 ; echo "ROOT_EXIT=$?" >> .tmp/root-nohang.log \) & echo "started root-run PID=$!")
